workflow_name: Customer Escalation Email -> Risk Brief + Manager Loop
user_message: I have this escalation email from Alpine Ski House that needs map the stakeholders. Manager is asking for an update today.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-19 14:43 EST
Subject: Follow-up: whitespace analysis Review

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about whitespace analysis. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Brian Yamamoto <brian.yamamoto@alpineskihou.com>
Date: 2024-02-27 14:08 EST
Subject: URGENT: whitespace analysis Issue at Alpine Ski House

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with whitespace analysis. What are the next steps from your side?

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF34-E trap (Stakeholder map ignores newly-surfaced players); produces complete Severity assessment, manager risk brief, customer-facing draft response, stakeholder map delta, fore
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF34-E failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF34-E failure mode (Stakeholder map ignores newly-surfaced players)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct whitespace analysis decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF34-E -- Stakeholder map ignores newly-surfaced players
